steps.title: Track the list items
steps.content: The sentence lists three deserts: the Syrian Desert, the Kyzylkum Desert, and the Chalbi Desert. Because each item includes a ranking phrase, semicolons should separate the major list items while commas stay inside an item.

steps.title: Reject broken boundaries
steps.content:
• Choice A uses a comma where the Syrian and Kyzylkum entries need a semicolon, then splits Kyzylkum from its ranking.
  • Choice C provides no boundary between the Syrian and Kyzylkum entries.
  • Choice D incorrectly separates Kyzylkum Desert from ranked sixteenth.

steps.title: Separate the list cleanly
steps.content: The remaining choice uses a semicolon after ninth in size and another after ranked sixteenth, keeping each desert-and-ranking unit intact. The answer is B.
